title: BEM-845 execute 844 next

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 23:03 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem844_read_843_continue_proof.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
if 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    status='dispatch_result_writer_repair_needed'
    next_action='patch dispatch result writer/commit path'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    # Strengthen dispatcher request and queue runtime retry.
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem845_claude_runtime_state_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-845 retry Claude dispatcher to create runtime state proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='claude_runtime_state_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick, then verify runtime state'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    msg=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem845_real_claude_response_retry.md')
    msg.write_text('# BEM-845 | REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE RETRY'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: write a real response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem845_claude_response.md. Include exact marker CLAUDE RESPONSE. Include Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED. Address protocol agreement for multi-agent architecture. No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem845_claude_response_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-845 retry real Claude response','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='real_claude_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick, then verify real Claude response'
else:
    status='triad_present_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
state={'bem':'BEM-845','status':status,'input_missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem845_execute_bem844_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem845_execute_bem844_next.md').write_text('# BEM-845 | Execute BEM-844 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-845'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem845_execute_bem844_next.json','governance/reports/bem845_execute_bem844_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if status=='claude_runtime_state_retry_queued': changed.append('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem845_claude_runtime_state_retry.json')
if status=='real_claude_response_retry_queued': changed.extend(['governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem845_real_claude_response_retry.md','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem845_claude_response_retry.json'])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-844 next action by queuing runtime or real-response retry for the current missing proof')
